# Prerelease Gate — 2026-06-29

## Summary
- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-eraseme
- HEAD: cf9513fae17125d8cfe86a2151f93aaf0993ecf8
- Last release: v0.6.2
- Proposed target: v0.7.0 (bump: minor)
- Gate: blocked

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | CI workflow succeeded; CodeQL succeeded; 5 local test failures are environment-specific (OllamaClient tests when `SYMERASEME_LLM_PROVIDER=ollama` is set locally) |
| Version consistency | PASS | 1 mention checked in pyproject.toml, 1 corrected (0.6.2 → 0.7.0) |
| README / doc currency | WARN | MCP server description stale (says "redact_file" but now exposes 21 tools); new features (multi-folder poll-inbox, AgentLLMClient, cron polling, Himalaya v1.2 compat) not listed; CHANGELOG missing v0.6.2 entry |
| Coverage vs threshold | WARN | 74% overall / no hard repo gate defined (warn-only) |
| Coverage regression | BLOCK | baseline 78% → 74% (delta -4%); BLOCK on a drop per rule 6 |
| Patch coverage | WARN | 6.1% of changed lines tested (115/1886); warn-only (no hard repo gate) |
| Assets preview | PASS | publish.yml workflow builds .whl + .tar.gz on release (same as v0.6.2 pattern) |
| Security | PASS | 0 open code-scanning alerts, 0 open Dependabot alerts |

## Findings
- [ ] **[BLOCK][Coverage] Coverage regression vs v0.6.2**
  - **Status quo:** Overall coverage dropped from 78% (v0.6.2) to 74% (HEAD). Delta: -4%.
  - **Likely cause:** 4 new/modified modules added ~1,886 lines with only 6.1% patch coverage. Major untested modules: `mcp_server.py` (752 uncovered lines), `services/watcher.py` (206 lines, 0%), `core/notify.py` (169 lines, 0%), `llm/agent_client.py` (210 lines, 24%).
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for the new modules via the existing test-coverage workflow.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage` → `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Patch coverage critically low**
  - **Status quo:** Only 6.1% of changed lines (115/1886) are covered by tests.
  - **Likely cause:** New features (MCP expansion, watcher, notify, agent client) were implemented without corresponding test coverage.
  - **Proposed solution:** Prioritize tests for `core/notify.py`, `services/watcher.py`, and `llm/agent_client.py`.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage` → `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] README MCP server description stale**
  - **Status quo:** README.md line 39 says "exposes a `redact_file` tool" but PR #476 expanded the MCP server to expose 21 CLI operations.
  - **Likely cause:** README was not updated when MCP expansion shipped in #476.
  - **Proposed solution:** Update README MCP section to reflect 21 tools, or make it version-agnostic.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] New features not reflected in README**
  - **Status quo:** Multi-folder poll-inbox (#481), Himalaya v1.2 compat (#467), AgentLLMClient (#470), cron-based polling (#477) are not listed in README features.
  - **Likely cause:** README feature list was not updated for v0.7.0 changes.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add new features to README Features section.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] CHANGELOG missing v0.6.2 entry**
  - **Status quo:** CHANGELOG.md jumps from v0.6.1 to v0.6.0; no v0.6.2 entry exists.
  - **Likely cause:** v0.6.2 was released without updating CHANGELOG.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add v0.6.2 entry to CHANGELOG, or include in v0.7.0 release notes.
  - **Handoff:** Include in v0.7.0 release commit

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
- `pyproject.toml:3` version `0.6.2` → `0.7.0`

## Next step
- gate=blocked → resolve the BLOCK finding via the handoff commands, then re-run `/06-gh-prerelease`
- First blocker: `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage` → `/03-gh-go` (coverage regression)
